reviewedExceptions.name: buffers
reviewedExceptions.rationale: Transitive runtime dependency via exceljs -> unzipper -> binary. The package has no license metadata in package.json, so this exception must be reviewed when ExcelJS is upgraded or replaced.

reviewedExceptions.name: tinymce
reviewedExceptions.rationale: TinyMCE npm package points to license.md; current bundled text offers GPL v2 or later or commercial terms. Crest Core is distributed as GPLv3, so GPL v2-or-later is compatible for open-source distribution. Keep license notices with releases.
